entity: Joel Embiid 70 PTS vs San Antonio Spurs on 2024-01-22 (PHI 133-123; Embiid's career high, the 12th 70-point game in NBA history)

query_target.sql: SELECT pts FROM fact_player_game_log WHERE player_name = 'Joel Embiid' AND game_date = '2024-01-22' AND pts = 70

notes: Active player; match:gte per the active-player convention. Embiid shot 24-of-41 from the field, 1-of-2 from three, and 21-of-23 from the line in this game. The fixture pins the game total (70 PTS) on the date BBR records it.
